name: Iter17 — Dashboard AI provider filter shows matching reviews only
description: When a user clicks the Gemini or OpenAI filter button in the History table, only reviews matching that provider are shown. Clicking All restores the full list.

planSteps.description: Verify the reviews history table is visible with at least one row
Verify filter buttons labeled All, OpenAI, and Gemini are visible above the table
Verify the table shows only rows with a Gemini provider badge, or an empty-state message if no Gemini reviews exist — no OpenAI-badged rows should be visible
Verify the table shows only rows with an OpenAI provider badge, or an empty-state message if no OpenAI reviews exist — no Gemini-badged rows should be visible
Verify the reviews table is restored and shows all rows again including both provider types
